title: Further research - process.exit improvements and edge cases
description:
Low priority follow-up from crash prevention audit:

## Potential Improvements (if time permits)
- TLSNotary: Could disable service instead of exit when fatal=true
- PeerManager:61 - Could retry peer connection instead of exit
- Consider circuit breakers for external service failures

## Edge Cases to Monitor
- Race conditions in async operations
- Memory pressure scenarios
- Network partition handling

## Reference
See memory: crash_vectors_audit_2026_03_07
